title: Hide oscore_ctx struct definition in oscore.c (make opaque via forward decl)
description: Update oscore.h to only forward-declare struct oscore_ctx. Move full definition to oscore.c or private header. Update internal functions. Follow existing security comment in header.
close_reason: Struct is now forward-declared in oscore.h with full definition and security comment in oscore.c. All call sites use API only. Tests pass via Zephyr native_sim build. Followed existing security comment. No subbeads created.
